title: trifolium congestum
intro: Trifolium congestum, also known as Red Clover or Crimson Clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate estrogen production and possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include relief from menopausal symptoms, improved heart health, and potential anti-cancer properties. Trifolium congestum is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used as a nutritional supplement in the form of isoflavones.
